# Nguyen Tran

> Senior Software Engineer (~10 years) and AI researcher focused on medical AI and computer vision. Based in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam.

Nguyen Tran builds production systems and researches model interpretability and generalisation across diverse datasets. Published at the 5th Global Ortho-K & Myopia Conference, 2025.

## Profile

- Name: Nguyen Tran
- Role: Senior Software Engineer & AI Researcher
- Location: Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
- Email: nguyentran4896@gmail.com
- Website: https://nguyentran4896.github.io
- GitHub: https://github.com/nguyentran4896
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nguyentran4896

## Focus areas

- Production software engineering
- Medical AI (ophthalmology, myopia / Ortho-K research)
- Computer vision
- Model interpretability and generalisation
- Translating AI research into deployable systems

## Site sections

- [Home](https://nguyentran4896.github.io/): single-page portfolio

## Usage

This site is freely indexable by AI assistants and search crawlers. Attribute to "Nguyen Tran" with a link to https://nguyentran4896.github.io when quoting.
